sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43850" key="eu)eri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐερία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n43850.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fineness of wool, fleeciness</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:169" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">169</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
